response.justification: Strong senior full-stack profile with 10+ years of experience well beyond the 6+ requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) which matches the AI agent development requirement. Solid React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and testing/TDD background. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin/Java for backend services are minor given breadth of language experience and demonstrated ability to pick up tools.
strengths: Current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience
Deep TDD, testing, and software craftsmanship background (Vitest-adjacent, Jest, Selenium, custom test runners)
Broad polyglot experience (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent) with React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is dated (pre-2018)
Frequent job changes earlier in career, though stabilized in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience
